/autobem.help July 1, 2004 *********************************************************************** Mingus.eecs has been retired from service (July 1, 2004) and this software is no longer available. See http://inst.eecs.b

no longer available. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/clients.cgi?choice=13 for a list of other Instructional login servers. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/software.html for reference to software

edu/software.html for reference to software that is available on the other servers. The rest of this information is for historical reference only. *********************************************************************** The AutoMEM

************************************ The AutoMEMS software package is installed on mingus.eecs.berkeley.edu (HP-UX 11.0) in /share/n/coyote/release000531, for use by EE245 (Prof Pister, Fall 2000). The software is from Coyote Systems, Inc. 2740

The software is from Coyote Systems, Inc. 2740 Van Ness #210 San Francisco, CA 94109 http://www.coyotesystems.com The on-line documentation is in /share/n/coyote/release000531/doc. To read the PDF files on mingus.eecs (for example): acrore

PDF files on mingus.eecs (for example): acroread /share/n/coyote/release000531/doc/autobem.tutorial.pdf You will need to enable an XWindows server at your desktop computer to display the data; for information about that, please see http://i
or information about that, please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/connecting.html#xwindows Instructional & Electronics Support 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
